title: TrustForge Encrypted Proof Bundle
description: Encrypted variant of .tfbundle (proof level L4). The plaintext is a canonical proof-bundle.schema.json document; the ciphertext is sealed with a per-bundle ChaCha20-Poly1305 data key and the data key is wrapped to one or more recipient ed25519 keys via X25519+HKDF-SHA256.

bundle_version.description: Version of the encrypted-bundle schema itself.

level.description: Proof level this bundle was sealed at.

ciphertext.description: Base64-encoded ChaCha20-Poly1305 ciphertext + tag over the canonical proof bundle.

nonce.description: Base64-encoded 12-byte AEAD nonce used to seal the ciphertext.

wrapped_keys.description: Per-recipient wrapped data keys. Each entry binds the bundle to one verifier.

transparency_anchor.description: Optional transparency-log anchor for the ciphertext.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical encrypted bundle (sans `signature` field).

recipient_key_id.description: Optional key-id of the recipient key used for wrapping.

ephemeral_public.description: Base64-encoded X25519 ephemeral public key the sender used.

wrapped.description: Base64-encoded ChaCha20-Poly1305 ciphertext + tag wrapping the data key.

wrap_nonce.description: Base64-encoded 12-byte nonce used for wrap_key encryption.
